steps.title: Recognize the function structure
steps.content: The function $W(x) = 4x + 80$ is linear, in slope-intercept form $W(x) = mx + b$. The coefficient 4 represents the time per plant watered, and 80 is the constant term—the part of total time that does not depend on the number of plants.

steps.title: Find the constant by evaluating at x = 0
steps.content:
To isolate mowing time alone, evaluate the function when no plants are watered ($x = 0$):
$$W(0) = 4(0) + 80 = 80$$
Since watering zero plants contributes zero minutes, the entire 80 minutes represents time spent mowing the grass. The answer is 80 minutes.
